title: Potion Warning
description: This mod warns you when a certain potion effect has run out.
body:
![Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f849ec65746aef1f7c4a8e4ee9f277c6e0becb9c.png)

> **IMPORTANT: This mod is getting updated soon!**

**PotionWarning** is a mod that warns the player whenever a certain potion effect runs out!

## Features
- Display Text whenever an effect runs out
- Choose which effect gets warned
- Full Text configurability
- Easy Enable/Disable
- Support for custom status effects

## Optional Dependencies
- [Mod Menu]([https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu))
- [Cloth Config API]([https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config))

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5871cd0a26db3f6a522f502c8005d161ec084099.png)
